Name: Tall Grass
Description: Four tufts of tall grass bunched together in a plot. The perfect hiding place for small Pokémon

Name: Tree-shaded tall grass
Description: Shaded tall grass that stays cool, even in the midday sun. Pokémon might stop by to relax

Name: Boulder-shaded Tall Grass
Description: tall grass near a large boulder. Perfect for hide-and-seek

Name: Hydrated tall grass
Description: Tall grass along the water's edge. A habitat thriving with energy thanks to an abundance of water

Name: Seaside Tall Grass
Description: Tall grass that stands firm against the spray of saltwater. Good for escaping the seaside heat

Name: Elevated tall grass
Description: Such a high elevation means this area is quite cool. The wind blows all the way through the tall grass

Name: Illuminated tall grass
Description: A gently lit plot of tall grass. Pokémon are drawn to the inviting light

Name: Pretty flower bed
Description: A beautiful bed of wildflowers. A faint, sweet aroma wafts about it.

Name: Tree-shaded flower bed
Description: Beautifully blooming flowers beneath the shade ofa tree. Pokémon are attracted by the damp scent

Name: Hydrated flower bed
Description: A field of blooming waterside flowers. Pokémon may be attracted by the aroma and clear water.

Name: Field of Flowers
Description: A large field of flowers. Every petal emanates an ambrosial aroma

Name: Elevated flower bed
Description: A bed of flowers blooming at high elevation. The wind carries their sweet aroma all around

Name: Grave with flowers
Description: A habitat that exudes a gentle elegance. Pokémon could rest in joyful peace here

Name: Flower garden
Description: Plant some hedges near blooming flowers, and you'll have a decent garden in no time flat

Name: Fresh Veggie Field
Description: Vegetables growing in a nice, wild field. Seems likely to attact Pokémon who enjoy farming

Name: Riding warm updrafts
Description: The warm air from three campfires rises high into the sky!

Name: Campsite
Description: A campsite that celebrates elements of nature. Pokémon warm themselves in front of the campfire

Name: Training waterfall
Description: Pokémon who like to train may come here to sit under the waterfall and tone their bodies

Name: Tantalizing dining set
Description: A table set with dishes-and a chair for sitting. Hungry Pokémon might swing by here..

Name: Picnic Set
Description: A basked placed atop a table is all it takes to feel a little picnicky

Name: Flowery table
Description: A flower vase placed on top of a table. Pokémon might sit on the chair to look at the flower.

Name: Bench with greenery
Description: A bench near some hedges. Pokémon can rest here and bask in nature

Name: Illuminated bench
Description: A bench illuminated by gentle light. Pokémon entranced by the light might stop by

Name: Exercise resting spot
Description: After a fierce training session, Pokémon can rest their tired bodies on this bench

Name: Urgent Care
Description: When injured, seek first aid immediately! Pokémon skilled at healing may come to this habitat.

Name: Gym first aid
Description: A first-aid kit is on hand in case any Pokémon injure themselves exercising

Name: Road Sign
Description: A solitary sign by the middle of the road. Pokémon might head in the arrow's direction

Name: Large luggage carrier
Description: This long, wide cart can fit two large crates

Name: Lumberjack's workplace
Description: Haul logs with the cart and split them on the tree stump. The chair is there for taking breaks

Name: Bed with a plush
Description: A bed with a cute doll. Small Pokémon would probably feel safe sleeping here

Name: Gently lit bed
Description: A bed bathed in gentle light. Pokémon could probably sleep peacefully here

Name: Grave offering
Description: Candles and plated food placed silently before a gravestone. Pretty creepyâ€¦

Name: Creepy grave offering
Description: Light the candles by the gravestone to add some swaying blue flames for double the eeriness

Name: Chansey Resting area
Description: A peaceful, refreshing spot to take a break while Chansey watches over you

Name: Irresistible scent and glow
Description: Pokémon may be lured here by the glow of the mushroom and the scent of the plant-shaped pot

Name: Floating in the shade
Description: Have fun on the inflatable boat! If you get tired, you can take a break under the umbrella

Name: Smooth tall grass
Description: A strange smooth rock has drained the vitality from this tall grass

Name: Factory Storage
Description: The large machine doesn't seem to work, even if you plug in the cords and hit the buttons

Name: Luxury chirp-chirp meal
Description: Bird Pokémon can lounge in the birdhouse after enjoying a meal of various berries

Name: Berry-feast Campsite
Description: A cozy campfire underneat a clear sky. Prepare a big feast and have a good time!

Name: Rain Dance site
Description: Reminders of rain and a plate for offering food. The perfect spot to call for rainy weather

Name: Sunny Day site
Description: Reminders of sunshine and a plate for offering food. This is the perfect spot to call for fair weather

Name: Professor's treasure trove
Description: It may look like a bunch of junk, but every single piece here is worthy of study to a professor

Name: Crazy log handicrafts
Description: This space is packed with wooden furniture. It feels almost like you're in a mountain cabin

Name: Very-berry space
Description: A berry table, a berry bedâ€¦Everything's a berry! Just looking at them makes you hungry

Name: Garden Terrace
Description: Take a breather in a garden chair while looking at softly lit flowers

Name: Tree-shaded snoozing Snorlax
Description: Pokémon might come here mistakenly thinking that this is an actual sleeping Snorlax!

Name: Good old-fashioned antiques
Description: Enjoy the retro vibe of this collection of wonderful antique furniture!

Name: Nothin' but Poke Balls
Description: All Poké Ballsâ€¦or so you thought! Living here is oddly comforting somehow

Name: Yellow tall grass
Description: A small plot made up of four tufts of yellow tall grass. Spots like this are often found in harbor towns

Name: Tree-shaded Yellow tall grass
Description: Yellow tall grass in the shade of a tree. The habitat has a melancholy feel to it.

Name: Elevated yellow tall grass
Description: Yellow tall grass growing at high elevation. It sways back and forth in the sea breeze

Name: Hydrated yellow tall grass
Description: Yellow tall grass by the water. A nice resting spot for Pokémon after they're done swimmign

Name: Marshy tall grass
Description: Tall grass growing in a marsh. Pokémon use this to wipe mud off themselves

Name: Overgrowth vending machine
Description: A lone vending machine amid yellow tall grass. Gotta stay hydrated-even out in nature

Name: Breezy flower bed
Description: A bed of refreshing seashore flowers. Pokémon are drawn in by its gentle scent

Name: Tropical vibes
Description: Seashore flowers rest beneath the leaves of a palm tree. Their tropical aroma drifts around the area

Name: Windy Flower Bed
Description: A breeze whooshes over this cool flower bed. As the windmill turns, a floral aroma spreads far and wide.

Name: Shaded beach
Description: The leaves of a palm tree serve as a parasol to Pokémon resting in the beach chair.

Name: Tropical seaside
Description: Kick back by a palm tree and feel the ocean breeze for the full tropical experience

Name: Resting spot
Description: Empty cardboard boxes and a fluffy straw bed. Opinions are divided on which provides better sleep.

Name: Perpetual mess
Description: Scattered toys and cardboard. Just when you think you're done tidying up, the mess somehow returns.

Name: Trash collection site
Description: A place to dump everyone's garbage. You might even spot some trash-hunting Pokémon here!

Name: Trash can central
Description: Trash cans put in place to prevent littering. You can sometimes find Pokémon inside them

Name: Trash disposal site
Description: Some trash left by a power pole. Its surroundings smell a little stinky

Name: Park bench
Description: After eating a snack, put your trash in the trash can. â€¦Think Pokémon can remember to do that?

Name: Tantalizing restaurant
Description: Dishes on a table. There's even a menu, so it's just like being in a restaurant.

Name: Tableside delivery cart
Description: Wheel out the dishes nice and slow, because once they reach the table, it's chow time

Name: Chirp-chirp meal
Description: Bird Pokémon are sure to come and enjoy feasting on the plated food.

Name: Café space
Description: Enjoy teatime while admiring the potted tree. Pokémon can feel refreshed here

Name: Beach Set
Description: Lounge under this parasol, and bask in the tropical vibes. Pokémon might enjoy relaxing here.

Name: Light-up stage
Description: A stage bathed in dazzling light. It seems likely to attract attention-seeking Pokémon

Name: Surprise in store
Description: A pop-art box surrounded by balloons. What's in the box? Open it and find out!

Name: Night festival venue
Description: The colorful neon lights of this festival entrance glow brilliantly, especially at night

Name: Changing area
Description: Give your look a once-over in the mirror after you change clothes. A place to become your ideal self!

Name: Private makeup stand
Description: The partition helps keep prying eyes away before you're ready for the public

Name: Knitting station
Description: Pokémon will be fascinated by the fluffy yarn and the adorable crafts that can be made from it

Name: Hot-spring shower
Description: You can't jump in the hot spring without rinsing off at a shower first! Pokémon might enjoy soaking here

Name: Resort meal prep
Description: Sitting by a campfire underneat a palm treeâ€¦Let's kick back and cook some food

Name: All packed up
Description: Let's pack some cardboard boxes full of stuff and stack them on top of a cart!

Name: Full recovery
Description: Nothing like a good nap when you're feeling sick. A caring Pokémon might even come to check in!

Name: Alarm clock sleep zone
Description: Setting the bedside alarm clock makes waking up in the morning a breeze

Name: Vending machine break area
Description: A long bench beside a vending machine. Pokémon might swing by to take a breather.

Name: Vending machine set
Description: A trash can beside a vending machine. Doesn't look like there are any empty cans inside

Name: Mini Game Corner
Description: When you're done playing arcade games, you can hit up the punching game to get your body moving!

Name: Waterwheel Spot
Description: This amazing facility generaes electriciy through the power of a waterfall

Name: Furnace Spot
Description: When you fuel this amazing contraption, it generates electricity with the power of fire

Name: Dock
Description: A cozy little dock on the beach. Swimming Pokémon might stop by now and then.

Name: Spooky study
Description: Light thre candle to read by firelight! This place feels spooky when night falls

Name: Playing pirate
Description: Stand in front of the wheel or ight by the cannons, and you'll feel like you're sailing the open seas!

Name: Working the register
Description: Put a register on a table, power it on, and boom! You'll be ready for business in no time

Name: Tiny Atelier
Description: Take a seat in front of the canvas and let your imagination run wild. Inspiration is waiting to strike!

Name: Gourmet's altar
Description: Putting an offering of food on this platter would surely delight Pokémon who live to eat

Name: Pikachu space
Description: The sofa and doll are both Pikachu! Some Pokémon might mistake them for the real Pikachu and stop by

Name: Cuteness overload
Description: Being surrounded by all this cute furniture will make you feel perfectly pampered

Name: Welcoming resort
Description: Relax on the sofa or lie down on the hammock, and you'll feel like you're in the lap of luxury.

Name: Plain life
Description: A simple yet calming space. Pokémon are sure to be comfortable here.

Name: Red tall grass
Description: A small plot made up of four tufts of red tall grass. Spots like this are often found in valleys

Name: Tree-shaded red tall grass
Description: Pokmon are drawn to this place, invited by the damp aroma of the red tall grass.

Name: Pointy tree-shaded rocky tall grass
Description: Lean against the rock in the tall grass, and take a break while admiring the large pointy tree.

Name: Hydrated red tall grass
Description: While red tall grass often grows in valleys, it also thrives just fine on the waterside

Name: Elevated red tall grass
Description: Red tall grass flourishes even in high-altitude areas like mountaintops

Name: Grassy training field
Description: The bags of dirt can be used as dumbbells. Perfect for Pokémon who love to train

Name: Graceful flower bed
Description: Numerous mountain flowers bloom to form an elegant and beautiful flower bed.

Name: Tree-shaded graceful flower bed
Description: The elegant aroma of these mountain flowers wafts all throughout the area

Name: Hydrated graceful flower bed
Description: These elegant mountain flowers bloom beautifully, even right beside thew ater.

Name: Flower garden stump stage
Description: A stage set up in a field of flowers. Hop on the stump to bathe in the spotlight and feel just like a star

Name: Toil in the soil
Description: A thriving vegetable field. Replacing the soil every so often provides fresh nutrients

Name: Uplifting duckweed
Description: You can walk on top of the duckweed or jump into the water and float next to them

Name: Mossy rest spot
Description: All that nice, damp moss makes this a great location for Pokémon who love humid places

Name: Mossy boulder
Description: A quiet, peaceful atmosphere. It looks like Pokémon could really unwind here

Name: Mossy hot spring
Description: A hot spring surrounded by green moss. Soak up the calming atmosphere as you soak in warm water.

Name: Open-air bath
Description: Pokémon can also soak in a nice hot spring while enjoying beautiful scenery

Name: Harmonious hot spring
Description: Some Pokémon enjoy moving between the hot spring and the cold bath to feel light and refreshed

Name: Piping-hot lava
Description: Nothin' but piping-hot lava here! Fire-type Pokémon simply can't resist visiting

Name: Digging and burning
Description: A big furnace with equipment next to it. Someone might come to light the flame

Name: Clink-clang iron construction
Description: It looks like construction is underway. Some strong Pokémon might show up to help

Name: Creepy white rocks
Description: The thick moss near the stalagmites and the long glowing lantern create a slightly creepy vibe.

Name: Container snacking
Description: Looks like someone snuck a snack by some storage containers. Pokémon might like a spot like this

Name: Dinner table surprise
Description: There's no better thrill than lifting the lid off a dish to reveal today's meal

Name: Best bread bakery
Description: Prepare some side dishes while you wait for bread to finish baking.

Name: Mini kitchen
Description: Wash your dishes and ingredients, then cook away on the stove. What's on the menu for today?

Name: House party
Description: Help yourself to food and drinks, and have a total blast with all your friends

Name: Lazy-photo album scrolling
Description: Kick back with a drink in your hand and use the tablet to reminisce over some photos

Name: Chirping recital
Description: Bird Pokémon may swoop in and use the microphone to show off their singing skills

Name: Recital stage
Description: This stage was made for just one thing-now get up there and SING!

Name: Box to the rhythm
Description: Pokémon can feel the rhythm here and get pumped for a training session

Name: Music and magazines
Description: Reading feels even more relaxing when you throw on some background music

Name: Mini museum
Description: Anything can look like a masterpiece if you pop it on an exhibition stand!

Name: Refreshing locker room
Description: Even a simple locker room can have a refreshing atmosphere with the addition of a houseplant or two.

Name: Bronze landmark
Description: A photoworthy bronze statue of three Pokémon. Their combined cuteness is sure to attract a crowd!

Name: Railroad crossing
Description: Absolutely no crossing while the bar is lowered! Butâ€¦will Pokémon actually sotp and wait?

Name: Chef's kitchen
Description: With a stove, a sink, and some key cooking equipment, this place is a chef's dream

Name: Absolute luxury
Description: Every single piece of this furniture set is top-notch, creating the ultimate air of luxury

Name: Heavy iron
Description: A monochromatic space with weighty furniture. Light the lantern to add another layer of calm

Name: Modern living
Description: Stylishly simple. The modern design gives off a sense of classiness

Name: Pink tall grass
Description: A small plot made up of four tufts of pink tall grass. Spots like this are often found in the skylands

Name: Tree-shaded pink tall grass
Description: Growing in the shade of a tree, this pink grass is just the tiniest bit damp

Name: Hydrated pink tall grass
Description: The pink of the tall grass contrasts beautifully with the blue hues of the water.

Name: Elevated pink tall grass
Description: Tall pink grass from way above the clouds. Even strong winds can't stop it from growing

Name: Concrete pipe secret base
Description: A concrete pipe that hasn't been used in al ong time. The hollow interior is perfect for a secret base.

Name: Fluffy flower bed
Description: A cute field full of lots of puffy skyland flowers

Name: Tree-shaded fluffy flower bed
Description: Poofy skyland flowers bloom cutely-even in the cool shade of a tree

Name: Hydrated fluffy flower bed
Description: Water can't diminish the gentle aroma wafting from these skyland flowers.

Name: Waterside dinghy
Description: Board the canoe, or just enjoy some tranquil time relaxing by the waterside

Name: Illuminated waterfall
Description: Use the torches to light a path to the waterfall. Pokémon might stop by to check it out

Name: Birdsong garden
Description: A comfy birdhouse with a neatly trimmed hedge. You can almost hear chirping

Name: Simple bathroom
Description: An ordinary bathroom. Pokémon might stop by to wash themselves.

Name: Cycling rest stop
Description: Stop your bicycle here for a quick break. Pokémon sometimes hide behind the vending machine.

Name: Fireplace nap spot
Description: If you're feeling chilly, you can sit by this fireplace and it will gently warm you.

Name: Surging psychic power
Description: Sit in front of the crystal ball and focus to gain mastery over your psychic powersâ€¦maybe.

Name: Fortune-teller's table
Description: Maybe using psychic power to peer into the crystal ball will give you a glimpse of the futureâ€¦

Name: Trash site TV
Description: A lone TV left out with the garbage. It looks like it can still be turned on.

Name: Oversized dumping ground
Description: A dumping ground where you can even throw away large items. Unwanted appliances can go here!

Name: Interrogation desk
Description: You and Arcanine, interrogating perps side by sideâ€¦ The tension in the air is palpable

Name: Sewer hole inspection
Description: Looks like repairs are being carried out here. Only workers are allowed in-no exceptions!

Name: Spotless Washing station
Description: Washing your face and drying it off with a towel feels refreshing. Check out how you look in the mirror!

Name: Home theater
Description: Some big speakers and a TV make this space feel just likea movie theater

Name: Study Area
Description: Just sitting at this desk with a pencil in hand is enough to make you feel a little smarter

Name: Rhythmic Living room
Description: A large TV with a rhythm game hooked up to it. Step on the mats in time with the beat!

Name: Squeaky clean
Description: Put lots of cleaner on the Mareep spone and make that bathroom shine

Name: Moisturizing makeup stand
Description: Making sure your skin is moisturized will ensure your makeup comes out even more perfectly than usual!

Name: Mini library
Description: Light the lamp to peruse the books at your leisure, even in the dark ofnight

Name: Game Corner battle zone
Description: Players site side by side here to game against each other!P okémon might come here to play.

Name: Playland
Description: To play on the big slide or with the toysâ€¦ Now that's a hard choice

Name: Work desk
Description: Sit on the office chair and type away at the computer. If you feel tired, grab a beverage and take a break!

Name: Office storeroom
Description: Packed with old documents and unused equipment. Lost Pokémon sometimes wander inside.

Name: Experiment Space
Description: A space for conducting experiments. Someone may have left their research notes behind.

Name: Professor's apprentice program
Description: Keep up with your research, and someday you might become as wide and learned as Professor Tangrowth!

Name: Researcher's desk
Description: Today's research topic is Pokémon's role in science! Some data has been entered into the computer

Name: Public reading material
Description: Anyone can freely pick up and enjoy the newspapers and magazines found here

Name: Heart-pounding surprise box
Description: The rhythm of the big drum, the spotlights on the boo-in-the-boxâ€¦ The suspense is palpable!

Name: Prank button
Description: A conspicuous button next to a boo-in-the-box. To press, or not to press, that is the questino.

Name: Picturesque photo cutout board
Description: Say cheese! Stick your face in the cutoutboard and snap a photo to commemorate your hoke.

Name: Tire Park
Description: For some reason, the tires are more enticing than the big slideâ€¦ Yeah! Let's play with all the different tires!

Name: Nature's market
Description: Just power up the cash register, and you'll be able to trade with your friends-even out in nature!

Name: Construction-site generator
Description: Construction needs a lot of electricity! You can use any leftover lumber as fuel

Name: Dojo training
Description: Once you emply the spirit of the warrior, you will be able to move even the heaviest of boulders

Name: Evil organization HQ
Description: A comfy couch in front of an organization's emblem. Sitting here makes you feel like a boss.

Name: Nine flames
Description: The gentle sway of these nine blazing flames gives their surroundings a subtly mystical ambeience

Name: Plush central
Description: Some Pokémon might mistake all these dolls for the real things

Name: Gamer's paradise
Description: A space perfectly tailored for gaming. Take a seat and immerse yourself in the world of games!

Name: Top pop
Description: The colorful pop-art furniture gives off a cheerful atmosphere that'll lift your spirits in no time!

Name: Fishing pond
Description: Cast a line and wait patiently. Perhaps a Water-type Pokémon will appear!

Name: Ocean fishing spot
Description: Ocean fishing can be fun! You may meet different species of Pokémon than you would in fresh water.

Name: Marsh fishing spot
Description: Pokémon live in marshlands too! Try casting your lin into some swampy water sometime

Name: Hot-spring Fishing Spot
Description: Pokémon enjoying a nice dip in the hot spring might be lure in with some bait.

Name: Magma fishing spot
Description: Catch Pokémon by fishing in magma. Wait, how do you do that without the line melting?!

Name: Amped rock stage
Description: The wail of the guitar marks the start of this amped-up performance

Name: Low-key rock stage
Description: The hum of the bass guitar marks the start of al ow-key musical performance

Name: Malicious knight's shrine
Description: A slightly eerie space where a mysterious ritual appears to be underway...

Name: Auspicious knight's shrine
Description: A slightly mystical space where a mysterious ritual appears to be underway...

Name: Wing Fossil Display
Description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once ruler of the skies

Name: Skull Fossil display
Description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This fossilized skull is as hard as iron

Name: Headbutt Fossil display
Description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's skull was harder than steel

Name: Armor Fossil display
Description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a hard neck frill that looks like a shield.

Name: Shield Fossil display
Description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's large neck frill was as sturdy as a fortress wall.

Name: Jaw Fossil display
Description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a piece of a jawbone that could crush anything,

Name: Despot fossil display
Description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once the ruler of the land.

Name: Sail Fossil display
Description: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This piece of neck sail was once frozen in ice.

Name: Tundra fossil display
Description: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. The specimen's beautiful neck sail resembles an aurora.

Name: Boundless blue beverage
Description: A clear-blue ice-cream float. It's like looking deep into the ocean

Name: Electrifying potatoes
Description: A basket of crispy potato stars. They're shockingly delicious!

Name: Burning-hot spice
Description: Putting hot sauce on this round pizza will make it so spicy that you'll feel like you're breathing fire.

Name: Elegant daytime treats
Description: Teatime is always midday. Take a seat, have a snack, and bask in the elegance of it all.

Name: Dark-chocolate cookies
Description: Cookies made from dark chocolate. They have a subtle, comforting taste without being overly sweet

Name: Leafy greens sandwich
Description: A sandwich packed with greens and veggies would really hit the spot right now

Name: Chilly shaved ice
Description: Shaved ice served with frozen toppings. Eating this could make you feel teeth-chatteringly chilly

Name: Lovely ribbon cake
Description: The large ribbon and heart decorations make this cake look quite lovely. It tastes incredibly sweet.

Name: Yellow carpet
Description: A field of warm, blooming yellow flowers. Just looking at it seems to fill you with energy

Name: Field-trip friends
Description: Pack a lunch box and canteen inside your backpack, and you're all set for a field trip

Name: Dandelion lunchtime
Description: Lunch box? Check. Tableware? Check. Time for a picnic lunch break!

Name: Treasure-hunting set
Description: A map and compass are essential treasure-hunting tools. Time to set off in search of jewels
